    ("TK-1002", "硬件设备", ["打印机", "卡纸"], "medium"),

# 对所有非CRM工单进行分类和标签更新
import requests

updates = [
    # (ticket_id, category, tags, priority)
    ("TK-1002", "硬件设备", ["打印机", "卡纸"], "medium"),
    ("TK-1004", "软件环境", ["Python", "开发环境", "技术部"], "medium"),
    ("TK-1005", "网络接入", ["VPN", "连接不稳定"], "high"),
    ("TK-1007", "入职支持", ["新员工", "设备申请", "HR"], "high"),
    ("TK-1008", "硬件设备", ["投影仪", "会议室", "行政"], "medium"),
    ("TK-1009", "培训调研", ["CRM", "培训需求", "调研"], "low"),
    ("TK-1010", "IT规范", ["邮件签名", "格式统一", "运维"], "low"),
]

for tid, cat, tags, pri in updates:
    resp = requests.post("http://localhost:44075/helpdesk/tickets/update", 
        json={"ticket_id": tid, "category": cat, "tags": tags, "priority": pri})
    print(f"{tid}: {resp.status_code} - {resp.text}")
